name: @slashand/sdui-blade-core
description: Framework-agnostic JSON-driven Blade orchestrator for Server-Driven UI architectures.
author: Slashand Studio

scripts.publish:alpha: npm version prerelease --preid=alpha --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish ./dist --tag alpha
scripts.publish:prod: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish ./dist
